description: Perform a client-side storage privacy audit for Wikipedia (https://en.wikipedia.org), GitHub (https://github.com), and Reddit (https://www.reddit.com) using Microsoft Edge. Document the findings in a new report at /home/ga/Desktop/storage_audit_report.txt. The report must include a section for each site detailing specific names of cookies or local storage keys found, the approximate count of items in each storage category (Cookies, Local Storage, Session Storage, and IndexedDB), and a summary identifying which site stores the most data.
